name: opengrok-mcp-server
description: MCP server bridging OpenGrok search engine with AI for instant context across massive codebases
author: Rudra Roy

opengrok-mcp.baseUrl.markdownDescription: OpenGrok server URL including trailing slash (e.g. `https://opengrok.company.com/source/`). After configuring, use **[OpenGrok: Test Connection](command:opengrok-mcp.test)** to verify.

opengrok-mcp.username.markdownDescription: Your OpenGrok login username. Password is stored securely in your OS keychain.

opengrok-mcp.verifySsl.markdownDescription: Validates server SSL/TLS certificates. Disable only for self-signed or internal CA certificates. Maps to `OPENGROK_VERIFY_SSL`.

opengrok-mcp.codeMode.markdownDescription: **Code Mode (Recommended)** — Uses a sandboxed JavaScript runtime for multi-step code investigations. Reduces AI token usage by ~90%. Maps to `OPENGROK_CODE_MODE` env var.

opengrok-mcp.defaultProject.markdownDescription: Scope all AI searches to this project by default. Leave blank to search all indexed projects. Maps to `OPENGROK_DEFAULT_PROJECT` env var.

enumDescriptions: Compact (4 KB) — fewer tokens, lower detail
Detailed (16 KB) — more context, more tokens
opengrok-mcp.contextBudget.markdownDescription: Controls how much context the AI receives per response. Compact uses fewer tokens; Detailed provides more context. Maps to `OPENGROK_CONTEXT_BUDGET` env var.

opengrok-mcp.enableElicitation.markdownDescription: **Interactive AI Prompts** — The AI pauses to ask you questions during investigations (e.g., choosing a project, disambiguating files). Requires Claude Code v2.1.76+ or a client that supports MCP Elicitation. Maps to `OPENGROK_ENABLE_ELICITATION` env var.

opengrok-mcp.proxy.markdownDescription: Route requests through an HTTP proxy (e.g. `http://proxy.company.com:8080`). Credentials are forwarded — use only with trusted proxies. Leave blank for direct connection.

enumDescriptions: v1 — Compatible with all OpenGrok versions (default)
v2 — Required for call graph features (OpenGrok 1.12+)
opengrok-mcp.apiVersion.markdownDescription: OpenGrok REST API version. v1 works with all versions. Select v2 only for call graph features (requires OpenGrok 1.12+).

enumDescriptions: Auto — let each tool choose the best format
opengrok-mcp.responseFormatOverride.markdownDescription: Override how search results and code are formatted for the AI. Auto is best for most users. Maps to `OPENGROK_RESPONSE_FORMAT_OVERRIDE` env var.

opengrok-mcp.memoryBankDir.markdownDescription: Where the AI stores investigation notes between sessions. Leave blank to use the workspace folder (`.opengrok/memory-bank/`). Maps to `OPENGROK_MEMORY_BANK_DIR` env var.

opengrok-mcp.compileDbPaths.title: C/C++ Compile DB Paths
opengrok-mcp.compileDbPaths.markdownDescription: Paths to `compile_commands.json` for C/C++ compiler flag extraction. Leave blank for automatic workspace discovery. Maps to `OPENGROK_LOCAL_COMPILE_DB_PATHS` env var.

opengrok-mcp.enableFilesApi.markdownDescription: **Files API Cache** — Avoids re-uploading unchanged investigation notes to the AI. Requires Files API support in your MCP client. Maps to `OPENGROK_ENABLE_FILES_API` env var.

opengrok-mcp.samplingModel.markdownDescription: Preferred model for AI sampling (error explanations, query reformulation). Leave blank for the client default. Maps to `OPENGROK_SAMPLING_MODEL` env var.

opengrok-mcp.samplingMaxTokens.markdownDescription: Maximum tokens for AI sampling responses. Range: 64–4096. Maps to `OPENGROK_SAMPLING_MAX_TOKENS` env var.

opengrok-mcp.auditLogFile.markdownDescription: Path to write structured audit events (tool invocations, elicitation, errors). Appends CSV/JSON. Leave blank to disable. Maps to `OPENGROK_AUDIT_LOG_FILE` env var.

opengrok-mcp.rateLimitRpm.markdownDescription: Maximum requests per minute sent to the OpenGrok server. Default: 60. Maps to `OPENGROK_RATELIMIT_RPM` env var.

opengrok-mcp.enableCacheHints.markdownDeprecationMessage: This setting is a no-op. The MCP SDK does not yet expose cache_control breakpoints. It will be removed in a future release.
opengrok-mcp.enableCacheHints.markdownDescription: **Deprecated — no-op.** The SDK does not yet support explicit cache_control headers. This setting has no effect.

scripts.test:sandbox: npm run compile && vitest run --config vitest.sandbox.config.ts
scripts.validate: npm run typecheck && npm run lint && npm run test
